items.title: Iran Just Struck 5 Countries, and Cardano Dropped to $0.16: But Kraken Quietly Staked $1B
items.summary:
Cardano trades near $0.1616, retesting the 20-day EMA after Iran-triggered volatility. Kraken's $1B stake pool registration and 233 weekly GitHub commits signal quiet institutional confidence. Key support at $0.155, resistance at $0.19–$0.20. Full technical breakdown inside.

The post
items.title_es: Irán acaba de atacar a 5 países y Cardano cayó a 0,16 dólares: pero Kraken apostó silenciosamente 1.000 millones de dólares
